name: UNBOXING
description: Clean unboxing reveal — hands opening the package, product reveal moment. Classic viral format.

steps.prompt: Product unboxing photography. Close-up of hands opening a premium branded box or mailer package to reveal the clothing product inside. Clean white or kraft paper packaging, the clothing product is neatly folded inside, crisp and clear. Top-down or slight angle view, minimal aesthetic, the product is the star of the reveal moment. Clean product photography meets UGC energy.

Unboxing reveal video. Hands carefully open a package and slowly reveal the clothing product, tissue paper being moved aside, the product is lifted out dramatically and held up to the camera, the fabric unfolds naturally. Clean background, satisfying unboxing ASMR energy, the clothing is shown clearly in the reveal moment.
